goal: Expose state graph context policy, prompt layout, prompt version, context block, strict tool schema, and relation provenance metadata as machine-readable JSON without scraping the human policy report.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Policy graph reports expose context and schema lineage to humans, but automation cannot reliably inspect policy, prompt, block, schema, and provenance metadata without parsing formatted text.
